what: Implement Project aggregate with explicit invariant enforcement: name trim/length validation, immutable path after creation, and deterministic archive/restore transitions.

where.description: Create Project aggregate root with constructor/factory and transition methods.
Define typed domain errors for invariant violations.
Add behavior tests for creation, rename, archive, restore, and forbidden path mutation.

acceptance.given: A valid name and path at creation time
acceptance.then: A Project instance is returned with stable id/path and initialized timestamps.

acceptance.given: An existing Project instance and a request to change path
acceptance.then: The operation fails with a domain error explicitly stating path immutability.

patterns.name: Hexagonal Isolation
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md -> section 2, domain has zero infra imports

context: Business rules must be enforceable in one place to prevent invalid project states across commands.
technicalNotes: Use pure domain code with no Node/DB dependencies. TDD vertical slices only. Merge-safe: introduce new project domain files without touching existing features. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
